variants.title: Filtrec RHR60N10B3/AB1 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR60N10B
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR60N10B3/AB1 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR60N10B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR60N10B3/AB1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR60N10B3/AB1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 52.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 22.2 mm, Length: 100.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 3.0 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 20 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 3.0 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 20 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Donaldson P566963 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Filtrec RHR60N10B
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P566963 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Filtrec RHR60N10B
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P566963 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt is engineered with advanced depth filtration technology, offering enhanced dirt retention and fluid cleanliness. It ensures optimal performance in high-pressure hydraulic systems, effectively protecting critical components from wear and extending system life. This filters robust construction and superior filtration efficiency make it ideal for demanding applications. Its reliable performance helps minimize maintenance costs and system downtime, ensuring consistent operation under tough conditions.

variants.title: Hydac 0060 R 010 ON Optimicron® Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR60N10B
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0060 R 010 ON Optimicron® Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR60N10B
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0060 R 010 ON Optimicron® Return Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
